findings.location: s1 — バージョン番号の準備 note
findings.description: The source defines formal method signatures via `.. function::` directives for `prepareVersion` and `prepareVersions`, including full parameter types: `boolean prepareVersion(ExecutionContext context, ExclusiveControlContext exclusiveControlContext)` and `boolean prepareVersions(ExecutionContext context, List<? extends ExclusiveControlContext> exclusiveControlContexts)`. The knowledge file mentions the boolean return and usage but omits the formal signatures — in particular the generic bound `List<? extends ExclusiveControlContext>` for `prepareVersions` is not captured.
findings.source_evidence:
.. function:: boolean prepareVersion(ExecutionContext context, ExclusiveControlContext exclusiveControlContext)
  .. function:: boolean prepareVersions(ExecutionContext context, List<? extends ExclusiveControlContext> exclusiveControlContexts)

findings.description: `MessageUtil` and `MessageLevel` appear in the `CommonExclusiveControlUtil` wrapper class code example in s1 but are not listed in the hints array.
